prompt: Create a bold cartoon manga-style illustration of Kobe waterfront at Meriken Park under a bright blue sky. In the foreground on a brick-paved harbor promenade, show a dramatic confrontation between exactly 2 main subjects: a fierce blonde anime girl and a huge wild boar. The girl stands on the left in a wide fighting stance, wearing a dark red sweater, black pants, and black-and-white sneakers, with long yellow-blonde hair and angry blue eyes; she grips a red Kobe Port Tower like an oversized baseball bat, with the white word “KOBE” visible near the top. The boar stands on the right, enormous and bristly, dark brown with black outlines, red angry eyes, a pink snout, large white tusks, sharp teeth, scratches on its flank, and a lowered charging posture. Along the bottom edge, include exactly 6 frightened bystanders seen from behind or in profile, all reacting with open mouths and shock marks: a spiky-haired man in a green hoodie, a brown-haired woman in a pink top, a man in a blue cap and jacket raising one hand, a woman with a bun in a yellow hoodie, a black-haired man in a gray hoodie, and a partially cropped man in a blue cap on the far right. Behind the promenade, draw dark blue harbor water and a detailed Kobe skyline with exactly 5 recognizable landmarks: a white sail-like maritime museum structure on the left, a red Kobe Port Tower shape behind the girl, a tall rectangular hotel tower near center, a white stepped hotel building on the right, and a red Ferris wheel at far right. Add exactly 5 puffy white clouds outlined in black across the sky. Use thick black comic outlines, flat saturated colors, exaggerated expressions, hand-drawn ink texture, dynamic action composition, and a humorous kaiju-meets-city-tourism feeling. Avoid photorealism, avoid extra text besides “KOBE,” and keep the scene as a single wide 16:9 illustration.
